message:
fix(tests): Improve test fixtures and beads integration

Update test infrastructure with better fixture handling and context
detection improvements. Adjust deny.toml for dependency auditing
and fix TUI browse mode rendering.

- Add fixture setup utilities in tests/integration/fixture.rs
- Fix context detection test assertions
- Update beads_real_tests for improved reliability
- Adjust deny.toml license and advisory configuration
- Fix TUI browse.rs cursor handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,7 +17,9 @@ db-urls = ["https://github.com/rustsec/advisory-db"]
 # Check for yanked crates
 yanked = "warn"
 # Ignore specific advisories (keep this list minimal!)
-ignore = []
+# yaml-rust is unmaintained but is pulled in transitively via syntect -> rich_rust
+# No upgrade path available until syntect migrates to yaml-rust2
+ignore = ["RUSTSEC-2024-0320"]
 
 [licenses]
 # Allow these licenses
